description: Rust program calling hyper's http2_only() and serve_connection() through a trait object dispatch pattern. The vulnerable functions are invoked indirectly via a ServerConfig trait.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: http2_only() and serve_connection() are called inside H2Config::configure() and start(), which are invoked through the ServerConfig trait object. Trait dispatch does not prevent reachability.

findings.human_justification: http2_only() is called inside H2Config::configure(), reachable through trait object dispatch from main(). serve_connection() is called in start(). The vulnerable symbols are present in compiled source.
